name: Outbound Studio
description: The full 7-agent outbound system: how the pipeline works end-to-end, from prospecting to claim offer delivery.

name: Prospector
description: Discovers SMBs with weak or missing web presence across target verticals and geos using multi-source search aggregation.

name: Geo Targeting
description: Hyper-local market targeting by city, metro, and radius. Powers geographic segmentation across all prospecting runs.

name: Deep Research
description: Multi-source research agent that synthesizes business intel, contact data, and market signals from public sources.

name: Strategist
description: Audits the target business's existing web presence and constructs the competitive pitch strategy and site blueprint.

name: SEO Auditor
description: 230+ rule technical SEO audit covering meta tags, crawl errors, Core Web Vitals, structured data, and indexing health.

name: Competitive Analysis
description: Maps the competitive landscape for a target vertical/geo, identifying positioning gaps and citation opportunities.

name: Programmatic SEO
description: Generates location and service page templates at scale. Used by the Builder agent to stamp out AEO-optimized page variants.

name: Website Cloner
description: Captures the target's existing site structure, assets, and content as a baseline for the spec rebuild.

name: Recreate Screenshot
description: Converts competitor or reference screenshots into clean, production-ready HTML/CSS layouts for rapid spec builds.

name: Auditor
description: Scores the built site against 40+ AEO and technical quality criteria. Loops back to Builder if the score falls below threshold.

name: AI SDR
description: Full AI sales development representative — end-to-end outbound prospecting, qualification, and sequence management.

name: Invoice Generator
description: Generates the claim offer package: pricing sheet, service scope, and 7-day urgency terms tailored to each target.

name: Skill Creator
description: Meta-skill for building, testing, and publishing new agent skills into the Outbound Studio skill registry.
